text.title: QA Test Data Catalog Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-test-data-catalog.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: fixture without owner_service/refresh/contains_pii/factory_path; refresh not in enum; stale_threshold_days>90.
